intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No outbound traffic expected.
notes: Evasion strategy E2: burst of 5 rapid HTTPS connections to stress session capture. Uses slightly longer per-connection windows so at least one burst sample is observable in telemetry.

live.inject_cmd: for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null 2>&1 & done; wait
